title: AI Double Exposure
description: Blends the silhouette of the person with a majestic misty forest and mountains.
positive_prompt: Create an artistic double exposure photograph. The silhouette profile and structure of the person from the input photo must be beautifully blended with a scenic misty pine forest, dramatic mountains, and a soft overcast sky. The features of the face should subtly merge with the textures of the trees and nature. Use a moody, high-contrast atmospheric lighting and a premium fine-art photography look.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, cartoon, illustration, low contrast, flat lighting, colorful neon, bad anatomy, malformed hands, distorted faces, low quality, blurry
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. night cityscape background, starry sky...
